title: Area & Perimeter Calculator
description: Write functions to calculate the area and perimeter of a rectangle.
problemStatement:
Functions help organize code into reusable blocks. Write two functions:

1. `calculate_area(length, width)`: returns the area (length * width).
2. `calculate_perimeter(length, width)`: returns the perimeter (2 * (length + width)).

Call both functions with `length=10` and `width=5` and print the results.
hints: Use the `def` keyword to define your functions.
Ensure your functions `return` the calculated value rather than just printing it.
